step_rationale: Glycosidase involved in inflammatory response signaling; role in myocardial injury inflammation less defined.
mechanism: MAN1A1 participates in inflammatory response pathways activated during myocardial infarction and ischemic injury.

references.title: Comparative Analysis of Plasma Protein Dynamics in Women with ST-Elevation Myocardial Infarction and Takotsubo Syndrome.
